title: ⚔️ Battle System Guide
footer: Veyra • Battles Help • Tip: Use /details loadout for gear info

pages.title: ⚔️ Battles Overview
pages.description:
Veyra battles are a **turn-based mind game**. Every round, both players choose an action (called a **stance**) and the system resolves the outcome based on speed, prediction, and your loadout.

There are two ways to battle:
• **PvP**: challenge another player for gold
• **Campaign (PvE)**: fight Veyra herself for progression using `/campaign`

This guide teaches everything you need to win.

fields.name: Main Commands
fields.value:
• `/battle <target> <bet>` - Challenge a specific player (PvP)
• `/open_to_battle <min_bet> <max_bet>` - Queue for automatic PvP matchmaking
• `/campaign [delay]` - Solo campaign battles (PvE)
• `/loadout` - Open loadout UI (weapon + spell selectors)

More info:
• `/details loadout`

fields.name: Core Idea
fields.value:
Battles aren’t about spamming attack. They’re about:
✅ predicting opponent stance
✅ managing HP + Mana
✅ timing Block/Counter
✅ using your spell at the right moment

pages.title: 📊 Core Stats (What matters)
pages.description:
Every fighter has a stat sheet. Your **weapon modifies** these values.

Base stats (before weapon bonuses):
• **HP**: 40
• **Attack**: 5
• **Defense**: 10
• **Speed**: 10
• **Mana**: 10

Extra mechanic:
• **Frost**: starts at 0 and builds up from certain weapons/spells.

fields.name: HP
fields.value:
Your health. **0 HP = defeat.**
Some effects block healing, so don’t rely on Recover/Heal forever.

fields.name: Speed
fields.value:
Speed affects:
• who goes first
• how reliable Block is
• some penalties/rewards during stance clashes

fields.name: Mana
fields.value:
Used for casting spells.
Run out of mana = you can’t Cast, and some matchups become unwinnable.

pages.title: 🧍 Stances (Your 5 actions)
pages.description:
Every round you choose exactly **one** stance. Each stance is strong into some stances and weak into others.

Mastering the stance mindgame is what separates winners from… spectators.

fields.name: ⚔️ Attack
fields.value:
Deal damage based on your Attack stat.
❌ Can get blocked/countered.

fields.name: 🛡️ Block
fields.value:
Reduce incoming damage by **70%**.
✅ On success, you gain defense.
❌ Can fail if you’re too slow (Speed matters).
⚠️ If both players Block, both lose **7 HP**.

fields.name: 🔁 Counter
fields.value:
Predictive stance. If opponent Attacks, reflect **50%** of their damage back.
✅ Destroys aggressive players.
❌ If opponent doesn’t Attack, you get punished (speed/defense penalties).

fields.name: 💧 Recover
fields.value:
Regenerate **HP or Mana** (alternates).
✅ Best used when opponent is defensive.
❌ Can be interrupted by Attack.

fields.name: 🔮 Cast
fields.value:
Use your equipped spell (costs Mana).
✅ Spells can swing fights instantly.
⚠️ Faster caster wins when both cast.

pages.title: 🧠 Stance Matchups (How rounds resolve)
pages.description:
Here’s the simplified matchup logic (most important interactions).

**Attack vs Attack:** both deal damage (faster goes first)
**Attack vs Recover:** recover gets interrupted
**Attack vs Block:** block reduces damage
**Attack vs Counter:** counter reflects damage

**Block vs Block:** both lose 7 HP
**Counter vs Counter:** both lose 10 defense

**Cast** beats all actions.

If you want a rule of thumb:
• Attack beats Recover
• Block beats Attack
• Counter beats Attack
• Cast beats all (if you can pay mana)

fields.name: Speed Priority
fields.value: When outcomes depend on timing (Attack order / Cast vs Cast / block defensive checks), **higher Speed wins**.

fields.name: Punishment Examples
fields.value:
Some wrong guesses cause penalties. Examples:
• Block vs Counter: speed penalties
• Counter vs Block: speed penalties
• Recover vs Counter: penalty to the wrong counter

Moral: guessing wrong hurts.

pages.title: 🌑 Status Effects (And how to play around them)
pages.description: Status effects are timed or stacking mechanics that persist across rounds. They’re usually applied by **spells** or certain **weapons**.

fields.name: Nightfall (5 rounds)
fields.value:
Each round: **a random stat is reduced by 2**.
This can ruin Speed-based plans, so don’t get greedy.

fields.name: Large Heal (4 rounds)
fields.value:
Each round: **heal 4 HP**.
Strong sustain tool, especially if you can force opponent defensive.

fields.name: Frostbite (stacking)
fields.value:
Builds Frost stacks. At **10 stacks**, target takes **50% of their current HP** as damage.
This is why Frost builds are terrifying.

fields.name: Veil of Darkness (4 rounds)
fields.value:
Incoming **Attack damage reduced by 60%**.
This punishes pure Attack spammers hard.

pages.title: ⏱️ Turn Timer + Penalties
pages.description: Nyx battles don’t wait forever. Each player must pick a stance within the timer.

fields.name: Round Timer
fields.value: You have **50 seconds** to choose your action each round.

fields.name: Timeout Penalty
fields.value:
If you fail to choose in time:
• you take **-25 HP**
• your action defaults to **Attack**

So yes, you can lose because you went AFK.

fields.name: Winning Tip
fields.value:
If your opponent is low and slow, pressuring them makes timeouts more likely.
(They’ll call it "unfair". It isn’t.)

pages.title: 🤺 PvP Battles (How betting works)
pages.description:
PvP is a 1v1 battle with gold on the line. You can either challenge directly with `/battle` or queue with `/open_to_battle` for auto-matching.

Direct challenge flow (`/battle`):
1) Challenger uses `/battle @opponent <bet>`
2) Bet is deducted instantly
3) Opponent accepts/declines
4) If accepted, opponent bet is deducted
5) Battle begins
6) Winner earns the pot minus fee

fields.name: Payout
fields.value:
Winner gets **90%** of the total pot.
Veyra takes **10%** fee.

fields.name: Etiquette (optional)
fields.value:
Bet what you can afford.
If you lose, don’t cry in chat like it’s a war crime.

pages.title: 🧰 Loadouts (Weapons + Spells)
pages.description:
Your loadout matters a lot. A good loadout makes your strategy easier; a bad loadout makes it painful.

Open your loadout UI with:
`/loadout`

For the FULL gear breakdown, use:
`/details loadout`

fields.name: Weapons (Overview)
fields.value:
• **Training Blade** - strong basic scaling (+1 Attack on hit)
• **Moon Slasher** - Frost builder (+4 Frost on hit)
• **Dark Blade** - disables healing for both players
• **Elephant Hammer** - tank tool (full block, high defense)
• **Eternal Tome** - longer status duration (+3 rounds)
• **Veyra’s Grimoire** ⭐ - spell-synergy (casting gives +Mana but costs HP)

⭐ Exclusive unlock exists via campaign progression.

fields.name: Spells (Overview)
fields.value:
• **Fireball** (15 mana) - 16 damage
• **Nightfall** (9 mana) - applies Nightfall
• **Heavyshot** (16 mana) - sets opponent HP equal to your HP
• **Erdtree Blessing** (14 mana) - Large Heal
• **Frostbite** (6 mana) - +5 Frost, -1 Speed
• **Veil of Darkness** ⭐ (10 mana) - 60% attack dmg reduction
• **Earthquake** (13 mana) - 5 damage, defense reset, -3 speed

⭐ Exclusive unlock exists via campaign progression.

pages.title: 🏆 How to Actually Win
pages.description: If you want to be dangerous (and not just noisy), follow these principles:

fields.name: 1) Stop spamming Attack
fields.value: Good players punish patterns. Mix in Block/Counter/Cast to stay unpredictable.

fields.name: 2) Track their mana
fields.value: If they’re low mana, their strongest option (Cast) disappears. That’s when you pressure.

fields.name: 3) Use Recover like a chess move
fields.value: Recover isn’t a panic button. Use it when you expect defense or when you’ve forced their hand.

fields.name: 4) Build toward a win condition
fields.value:
Examples:
• Frost stacks → burst at 10
• Nightfall → stat collapse
• Heavyshot timing → swing HP state

Random moves lose to real plans.
